name: lean4-contribute-codex
description: Codex contribution workflow plugin for drafting and submitting lean4-skills bug reports, feature requests, and shareable insights.

interface.shortDescription: Consent-gated issue drafting workflows for lean4-skills.
interface.longDescription: Draft and submit lean4-skills bug reports, feature requests, and reusable insights with explicit review and submit confirmations.
defaultPrompt: Draft a lean4-skills bug report from this failed workflow.
Turn this pain point into a lean4-skills feature request.
Draft a shareable insight issue from this session pattern.
